title: eriophyllum lanatum var. monoense
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. monoense, also known as a California fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriophyllum lanatum var. monoense are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
